channel.title: ALLY — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on ALLY (Ally Financial) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED ALLY (+11%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added ALLY in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)
